creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
sorry, but
without patch
 strings /usr/local/libexec/apache24/mod_auth_mysql.so |grep scram
make_scrambled_password

with patch
strings /usr/local/libexec/apache24/mod_auth_mysql.so |grep scram
my_make_scrambled_password

That means it should work also without patch.
